519 O0400B3A_OT_TRTMT_MINUTE_NUM O0400B3A_OT_TRTMT_MINUTE_NUM O0400B3A Occupational Therapy Co-Treatment Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that occupational therapy was administered to the resident in co-reatment sessions in the last seven days. ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective
